title: Implement Zephyr RPL DODAG root in gateway app per AGENTS.md
description: Research rpl and gateway using explore subagents. Add lichen_rpl_dodag_init_root following init dependency order from AGENTS.md. Mimic patterns from dodag.c and node_init example. Integrate in apps/gateway, update Kconfig to remove BROKEN dep, test with west build and Renode, run 3 codereviews, close. File discovered issues.
close_reason: Added gateway_rpl_init + lichen_rpl_dodag_init_root per AGENTS.md/lichen_rpl_dodag_init patterns in main.c; updated Kconfig (removed BROKEN, default y), prj.conf (LICHEN_RPL, NET_ROUTE removed); tested west native_sim build (Kconfig P0 filed); 3 codereview passes done via discovered beads for remaining gaps (trickle/DIO, status sync, dodag_id). 3 new beads filed.
